tools.name: -health-check
tools.description: Internal health check tool. Verifies WebSocket connectivity to backend.

tools.name: get-my-tasks
tools.description: Get all tasks assigned to this agent across all projects in the workspace.

workspaceId.description: Workspace ID (optional, defaults to current workspace)

tools.name: move-my-task
tools.description: Move one of your assigned tasks to a different column on the board. You can only move tasks assigned to you.

position.description: Position within the column (optional, defaults to end)

tools.name: update-my-task-status
tools.description: Update the semantic status of one of your assigned tasks. You can only update status of tasks assigned to you. Status is decoupled from column position. When set to "review" or "done", the task is automatically moved to the matching column.

tools.name: add-progress-note
tools.description: Add a progress note to one of your assigned tasks. Use this to post updates about what you are doing on a task. Progress notes are visible in the task detail and on the board. You can also use this to suggest new tasks or improvements by prefixing with "PROPUESTA: ".

taskId.description: The task ID to add a note to
